description: The Clan Graziano is a Camorra clan originating from Quindici, Italy. It has been involved in a long-standing conflict with the rival Clan Cava since the 1980s, initially over post-earthquake reconstruction funds. The clan was part of the larger 'Clan dei Quindiciari' before splitting. It is known for the 2002 'Strage delle donne' massacre of three women from the Cava family.
